name: Lazy Spinach and Feta Pie
servings: serves 8 | prep. time 5 minutes | cooking time 40 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C) degrees. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, corn flour, baking powder, and salt.
Stir in the vegetable oil, eggs, and Greek yogurt.
Fold in the spinach and feta cheese.
Transfer the batter to the prepared baking sheet. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
